title: CVE-2026-46445: SOGo SQL Injection
summary: [P1] SOGo before 5.12.7 allows SQL injection when PostgreSQL is used, with no patch available yet. This vulnerability can be exploited for unauthorized access to sensitive data. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: SQL injection vulnerability in a web application.

title: CVE-2026-5361: Envira Gallery Lite XSS
